name: AIA_getClassificationInstancesGeneric
description: query classification instances. Generally nested within more specific query rule or used for 1 off filter scenerios
sail_code:
rule!SHRD_UTIL_QueryRecord(
  recordType: recordType!AIA Classification Instance,
  returnType: ri!returnType,
  executeWhen: ri!executeWhen,
  identifier: ri!instanceIds,
  pagingInfo: ri!pagingInfo,
  sort: ri!sort,
  fields: a!defaultValue(
    value: ri!fields,
    default: rule!AIA_CLASSIFICATION_INSTANCE_FIELDS()
  ),
  logicalExpressions: ri!logicalExpressions,
  filters: {
    #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_queryFilter"(
      field: recordType!AIA Classification Instance.id,
      operator: "in",
      value: ri!instanceIds,
      applyWhen: a!isNotNullOrEmpty(ri!instanceIds)
    ),
    #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_queryFilter"(
      field: recordType!AIA Classification Instance.modelVersionId,
      operator: "in",
      value: ri!modelVersionIds,
      applyWhen: a!isNotNullOrEmpty(ri!modelVersionIds)
    ),
    #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_queryFilter"(
      field: recordType!AIA Classification Instance.modelVersion.modelId,
      operator: "in",
      value: ri!modelIds,
      applyWhen: a!isNotNullOrEmpty(ri!modelIds)
    ),
    #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_queryFilter"(
      field: recordType!AIA Classification Instance.modelVersion.model.key,
      operator: "in",
      value: ri!modelKeys,
      applyWhen: a!isNotNullOrEmpty(ri!modelKeys)
    ),
    #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_queryFilter"(
      field: recordType!AIA Classification Instance.documentId,
      operator: "in",
      value: ri!documentIds,
      applyWhen: a!isNotNullOrEmpty(ri!documentIds)
    ),
    ri!additionalFilters
  }
)
